_readme: App manifest. Edit here to add/remove tools. macinstall.sh reads this file.

_sources.smb: Auto-mount on login via LaunchAgent; credentials stored in macOS Keychain

ai_skills.desc: find-skills — discover and install agent skills

formulae.name: eza
formulae.desc: ls replacement — colors, icons, git status

formulae.name: bat
formulae.desc: cat replacement — syntax highlighting, line numbers

formulae.name: coreutils
formulae.desc: GNU core utils (realpath etc. used by scripts)

formulae.name: onefetch
formulae.desc: Git repo summary — run 'of' inside a project

formulae.name: starship
formulae.desc: Prompt — git branch, language version, timing

formulae.name: fzf
formulae.desc: Fuzzy finder — Ctrl+R history, file search

formulae.name: mas
formulae.desc: Mac App Store CLI — installs store apps from terminal

formulae.name: catimg
formulae.desc: Terminal image renderer — used by nvim dashboard

formulae.name: tree-sitter-cli
formulae.desc: Treesitter parser CLI (used by nvim treesitter)

formulae.name: ripgrep
formulae.desc: Fast grep — used by nvim live grep and fzf

formulae.name: fd
formulae.desc: Fast find — used by fzf and nvim file pickers

formulae.name: rust
formulae.desc: Rust toolchain (cargo) — required for blink.cmp Rust fuzzy binary in nvim.12

formulae.name: atuin
formulae.desc: Shell history with fuzzy search + sync

formulae.name: tealdeer
formulae.desc: Fast tldr — cheatsheets instead of man pages

formulae.name: jq
formulae.desc: JSON processor — query/transform JSON on CLI

formulae.name: zoxide
formulae.desc: Smarter cd — replaces OMZ z plugin

formulae.name: nicowillis/programs/pokemon-colorscripts-mac
formulae.desc: Colorful Pokemon sprites in terminal — used by fastfetch logo

casks.name: stats
casks.desc: CPU / RAM / network in menu bar

casks.name: stremioservice
casks.desc: Stremio Web companion server — for web.strem.io

casks.name: orbstack
casks.desc: Docker Desktop replacement — lighter and faster

casks.name: karabiner-elements
casks.desc: Keyboard remapper — Right Cmd alone=F13 (Leader Key), Caps Lock=Control

casks.name: leader-key
casks.desc: Vim-style leader key launcher — trigger=F13 (Right Cmd tap)
